_meta.purpose: Reference vectors for the Level-2 pipeline (server-side HMAC). The test salt below is NOT the production secret salt — it is a deterministic constant for cross-implementation parity testing only.
_meta.test_secret_salt_note: 32 bytes of 0x07. Production deploys MUST use a random 32-byte salt generated at the 5-of-7 custodian ceremony; this constant exists exclusively to verify that Python audit/audit.py and the TypeScript Worker produce bit-identical results under the same inputs.
